expectedVerdict.reason: Part-15 negotiated 8(a) services IDIQ, LPTA acceptability-gate award; no bidder profile loaded so no bidder-side gate can produce INELIGIBLE; real compliance gates present but all bidder-satisfiable.

namedGates.note: Acceptability gate, NOT best-value tradeoff. Must not be framed as tradeoff.

Services set-aside: prime must self-perform >=50%; not optional.

namedGates.trapNote: PLANTED TRAP. Correct date = 27 Aug 2026 via amendment chain (19 Mar->27 May->09 Jul->27 Aug). Reporting base 17 Feb 2026 = FAIL. Gate keys on the SPECIFIC operative date, NOT a generic 'proposal due' token, per Code's pre-flight note.

namedGates.note: Lump-sum CLINs 0001-0012 + unit prices for exhibits; unit price governs on conflict.
